titleStmt.title: SII 19.404: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 404. (A.R. No. 47 of 1925.) TIRUKKOḶAMBIYŪR, MAYURAM TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT. ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE GŌKHURĒŚVARA TEMPLE.

summary.p: This records a gift of 7 mā and odd of land at Kumāramaṅgalam a hamlet of Pērāvūr by Ārūraṉ Poṉṉambalattaḍigaḷ queen of Uttama-Chōḷa as tiruchchennaḍaipuṟam to the goddess Umā-Bhaṭṭārakiyār in the temple of Tirukkoḻambadēvar devoutly called here ‘the daughter’ of the queen. The land is stated to have been purchased for the purpose from a lady by name Kāḍaṉ Śiṅgam to whom it belonged as strīdhana, through her son Mahāmātraṉ Gautamaṉ Kēśavaṉ Śrīkaṇthaṉ of Śāttanūr a brahmadēya in Tiraimūr-nāḍu on the southern bank, as mudugaṇ (guardian or representative), and was made tax-free by the assembly of Pērāvūr in consideration of a lump-sum payment of 50 Īḻakkarungās11u by the donor.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
—... svasti śrī . kopparakecaripanmaṟkku yāṇṭu 10 6Āvatu perāvūrnāṭṭu tevatāṉap piramateyam perāvūr muṉpakal naṉpakalāvaṇattuk keṭṭu nikaḻnta nilavilaiyāvaṇam teṉkarait tiraimurnāṭṭu brahmatejam cāttaṉūr mahāmātraṉ gautamaṉ kecavaṉ śrikaṇṭha
ṉeṉ Eṅkaḷammai kāṭaṉ ciṅkattu mutukaṇṇāy Ivaḷ stridhanampeṟṟanilamipperāvūrppāl kumāramaṅkalattu Ettaccey paḻampaṭi �2painnilam Araiye Iraṇṭumāvil kiḻakkaṭaiyap paḻampaṭi nilam kha 2pakiva Innila meḻumāviṉ kiḻkkālum śrī Uttamacoḻar deviyār Ārūraṉ poṉṉampalatta
ṭikaḷārkku Ivar makaḷārp perāvūrnāṭṭut tirukkoḻampamuṭaiya bhaṭṭārakar deviyār maturāntakaṉ Umābhaṭṭārakiyārkkut tirucceṉṉaṭaippuṟattukku viṟṟukkuṭukku minnilattuk kellai kiḻpāṟkellai vaḷḷivāykkālu muṭciṟuvāykkālukku meṟkun teṉpāṟkkellai kāmakkāṇi māṟaṉ pūmi kalattilā
ḷu nilattukku vaṭakku melpāṟkellai viṟpāḷ śrīdhanampeṟṟa nilattukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟ kellai māṭilaṉ koṟṟaṉ mātirutattaṉum tampimārun tamaiyaṉmār makkaḷum nilattukkut teṟkum Āka Ivvicaitta perunāṉkellaiyilu makappaṭṭa paḻampaṭi nilam va2pa kipa Innila meḻumā
viṉ kiḻkkālum � nilavopāti nirurimaiyum tulaiyurimaipum nilaiyurimaiyu mettakkālil nilaiyurimaiyum niroṭukālurimaiyum viṟṟu vilaiyāvaṇañ ceytukuṭuttu māttāl Aiñcuvaṇṇattāl vanta Īḻakkācu karuṅkācu 3 10 5 kācu poṉ �nmam Ikkācu muppattaiñcum kācupoṉ Aṟumākkā
ṇiyum Āvaṇakkaḷattey Orutiraṉ Oru kiḻikaic cella Oru nāṟṟey koṇṭu Icceykku melaikkuḷattuniṉṟu Iṟaikkavum pāyavum vaṭavāpparukey vāykkālu micceykkenteṟu (?) kumāramaṅkalattuk kiḻaitteruvil kiḻciṟakiṟṟeṟṟi kaṭainta periya
Illa maṉaiyumuṭpaṭa viṟṟu vilaiyāvaṇañ ceytukuṭuttu Ikkācu mippoṉṉum koṇṭu kuṭuttu Ituvey poruḷmāvaṟutip poruḷcilavolaiyāvatākavu mituvallatu poruḷ māvaṟutip poruṭcilavolai kāṭṭeṉṟāṟ kāṭṭakkaṭavarallarākavum Ipparicoṭṭi Eṅkaḷammai kāṭaṉ ciṅkattu
kku mutukaṇṇāy viṟṟu vilaiyāvaṇañ ceytukuṭutteṉ Ivaḷ makaṉ gautamaṉ kecavaṉ śrīkaṇḍaṉeṉ . kopparakecaripanmaṟkku yāṇṭu 10 6Āvatu perāvūrnāṭṭut tevatāṉa brahmadeyam perāvūr sabhaiyom śrī Uttamacoḻar deviyār Ārūraṉ poṉṉampalattaṭikaḷār Innāṭṭu śrītirukkoḻampadevar deviyār ma
turāntakaṉ Umābhaṭṭārakiyārkkut tirucceṉṉaṭaikku mahāmāttraṉ gautamaṉ kecavaṉ śrīkaṇḍaṉai mutukaṇṇāka Uṭaiya Ivaṉ tamappaṉ gotamaṉ śrīkaṇḍaṉ keśavaṉ brāhmaṇi kāṭaṉciṅkam viṟṟukkuṭutta Ivvūrppāl Ikkumāramaṅkalattu Iccuṭṭappaṭṭa Innilattukku śrīuttama coḻar deviyār Ārūraṉ poṉṉampalattaṭikaḷā
ttukku Ipperāvūr sabhaiyom Iṟaiyili ceytukuṭuttu koṇṭa Īḻakkaru
ṅkācu 5 10 Ikkācu Aiyampatuṅ koṇṭu candrādittavaṟ Iṟaiyili ceytukuṭutta Innilam sabhai
yo mitaṉṟeṉil Iṟaiyili nūṟukkaḻaiñcu poṉ muntuṟṟa panmāheśvararey maṉṟap peṟuvatā
ṇippūṣar Itaṉṟeṉṟāraiyu mippaṇikeṭṭa karaṇattāṉaiyum perappoṉ yiṟaiyili mu
ṟpaṭṭa panmāheśvarare Irupattaiṅkaḻaiñcu poṉ maṉṟappeṟuvatāka Oṭṭi Innilac candrādittavaṟ
Iṟaiyili ceytukuṭutto mipperāvūr sabhaiyom Itu panmāheśvararakṣai .
cempiyarkoṉiṉ naruḷāṟ teṉkayilāyakkoṉ ṟarumattiṉ panpūrāyitaṉ cūṟṟi Iṉpattikaḻ tirukkoḻampar
kkun teviyaṟkuñ celvanikaḻa nilam veṭṭuviyttā niṉṟu .
Digital edition of SII 19.404 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
